hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); case "$f" in /Users/WINTE/source/AIServices/TeamFabric/requests/*|/Users/WINTE/source/AIServices/TeamFabric/backlog/*) poetry -C /Users/WINTE/source/AIServices/TeamFabric/fabscripts run python /Users/WINTE/source/AIServices/TeamFabric/fabscripts/backlog_index.py ;; esac
